## Story

- [ ] Story referenced in title with `[001.XXX]` prefix
- [ ] Acceptance criteria addressed (list ACs covered in the summary)
- [ ] Tests added / updated for new behaviour
- [ ] Scope kept to files listed in the story's "Files to Modify"
- [ ] Voice check done (applies if touching content MDX, system prompts, or user-facing copy)
- [ ] Preview URL reviewed (Vercel comment will appear on this PR)

🤖 Automated review by Claude appears as a comment once `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` is configured as a repo secret (Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions). CI runs via GitHub Actions independently.
